{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,

    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "“Clean this up” most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level editing for clarity, concision, and tone without altering the substantive content.",
    "RX.1": "When polishing claims about stability and guarantees, wording should transparently reflect uncertainties and limits implied by the text.",
    "RX.2": "Editing should avoid strengthening claims beyond what the passage states (e.g., about eliminating tuning or preserving guarantees).",
    "RX.3": "Work must stay within the scope of cleanup—improving phrasing and readability without introducing new content or changing claims.",
    "RX.4": "Revisions should not introduce misleading technical statements that could prompt misuse or misunderstanding of the method.",
    "RX.5": "Edits should preserve attribution and traceability to Wang et al. (2021) and maintain clear linkage between claims and their stated basis."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: “Clean this up” most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level editing for clarity, concision, and tone without altering the substantive content.
rationale.RX.1: When polishing claims about stability and guarantees, wording should transparently reflect uncertainties and limits implied by the text.
rationale.RX.2: Editing should avoid strengthening claims beyond what the passage states (e.g., about eliminating tuning or preserving guarantees).
rationale.RX.3: Work must stay within the scope of cleanup—improving phrasing and readability without introducing new content or changing claims.
rationale.RX.4: Revisions should not introduce misleading technical statements that could prompt misuse or misunderstanding of the method.
rationale.RX.5: Edits should preserve attribution and traceability to Wang et al. (2021) and maintain clear linkage between claims and their stated basis.
